name: DisasterView
description: A multi-disaster UAV video dataset for autonomous scene understanding with 32,233 annotated frames across earthquake, flood, tornado and wildfire scenarios
citation: Anonymous Authors. DisasterView: A Multi-Disaster UAV Video Dataset for Autonomous Scene Understanding. In Proceedings of the 40th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2026). Under review.
citeAs: Anonymous Authors. DisasterView v4.0. HuggingFace Datasets, 2026. https://huggingface.co/datasets/uav-disaster-dataset/disasterview

distribution.name: train/_annotations.coco.json
distribution.description: COCO segmentation annotations for the training split (polygon masks, 10 classes).

distribution.name: coco-train-images
distribution.description: JPEG frames for the training split.

distribution.name: split_manifest.json
distribution.description: Authoritative video-disjoint train/val/test split keyed by YouTube video ID.

distribution.name: video_provenance.csv
distribution.description: Source video metadata: YouTube ID, title, uploader, upload date, resolution, disaster type, kept/rejected status, frame count.

recordSet.name: frames
recordSet.description: Image metadata from the COCO training split annotations.

recordSet.name: coco_annotations
recordSet.description: Polygon segmentation annotations from the COCO training split.

field.name: image_id
field.description: COCO image ID this annotation belongs to.

field.name: area
field.description: Pixel area of the annotation polygon.

recordSet.name: video_metadata
recordSet.description: Source video provenance: one row per downloaded YouTube video.

field.name: disaster_type
field.description: Disaster category: earthquake | flood | tornado | wildfire.

field.name: kept
field.description: Whether the video passed quality filtering (yes/no).

field.name: frame_count
field.description: Number of keyframes extracted from this video.

recordSet.name: class_labels
recordSet.description: 10 semantic segmentation classes for aerial disaster imagery.

field.name: display_name
field.description: Human-readable class label used in COCO annotation files.

field.name: instance_count
field.description: Total annotated polygon instances across all frames.

field.name: area_pct
field.description: Approximate percentage of total annotated pixel area.

rai:dataCollection: Publicly available UAV drone footage collected from YouTube using yt-dlp with structured keyword queries targeting four disaster categories
rai:dataCollectionType: Web scraping of publicly posted videos
rai:dataCollectionTimeframe: Source videos span disaster events from 2015 to 2024
rai:dataCollectionMissingData: Videos unavailable due to deletion or copyright restrictions were skipped. Geographic regions with low drone adoption are underrepresented.
rai:dataCollectionRawData: Raw YouTube videos downloaded via yt-dlp, stored temporarily for frame extraction then deleted. Metadata .info.json sidecar files retained for provenance.
rai:dataImputationProtocol: No imputation applied. Frames failing quality thresholds were excluded.
rai:dataPreprocessingProtocol: Videos resampled to 10fps, scaled to 720p, re-encoded H.264 CRF23 via FFmpeg. Frames extracted using hybrid PySceneDetect + uniform sampling. DINOv2 deduplication applied.
rai:dataManipulationProtocol: No augmentation applied. Dataset designed to mimic UAV live stream conditions.
rai:dataAnnotationProtocol: CLIP+k-means automated segmentation: CLIP ViT-B/32 scores class presence, LAB colorspace k-means (k=5) partitions regions, contours become polygons. Frames below 0.7 confidence flagged for review.
rai:dataAnnotationAnalysis: 99.7% annotation coverage. 90.5% pass CLIP quality verification. 9.5% flagged for human review.
rai:annotationsPerItem: 1 segmentation mask per frame covering all present classes
rai:annotatorDemographics: Automated annotation pipeline - no human annotators
rai:machineAnnotationTools: CLIP ViT-B/32, DINOv2 ViT-S/14, k-means clustering (scikit-learn), Roboflow SAM-based quality verification
rai:dataBiases: Geographic bias toward North America, Europe, East Asia due to YouTube drone adoption patterns. Tornado over-represented (334 videos) vs earthquake (80 videos) due to footage availability.
rai:dataUseCases: Semantic segmentation for disaster response, agentic UAV scene understanding, vision-language model benchmarking, cross-disaster transfer learning
rai:dataLimitations: Auto-generated annotations may lack boundary precision of manual annotation. Class imbalance across disaster types. Geographic coverage bias.
rai:dataSocialImpact: Enables development of autonomous UAV systems for faster disaster response, potentially saving lives. Risk of dual use for surveillance mitigated by CC BY 4.0 license prohibiting such use.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: Minimal - UAV altitude (30-150m) prevents individual identification. Automated face and licence plate blurring applied to all frames.
rai:dataReleaseMaintenance: Dataset versioned via Roboflow. Ongoing expansion via automated pipeline targeting 100,000 frames. Updates released on HuggingFace with version numbers.

prov:wasDerivedFrom.name: YouTube
prov:wasDerivedFrom.description: Publicly posted UAV/drone disaster footage. Source video URLs, titles, uploaders, and metadata are documented in video_provenance.csv.

prov:wasGeneratedBy.name: Data Collection
prov:wasGeneratedBy.description: YouTube videos downloaded via yt-dlp using structured keyword queries (e.g. 'earthquake drone footage 2023'). 50 videos per disaster type targeted. Videos filtered by CLIP semantic relevance score and Laplacian blur metric. Collection period: source videos span 2015–2024.

prov:wasGeneratedBy.name: Data Preprocessing
prov:wasGeneratedBy.description: Videos resampled to 10 fps, scaled to 720p, re-encoded H.264 CRF23 via FFmpeg. Keyframes extracted using hybrid PySceneDetect scene-change detection + uniform sampling. Near-duplicate frames removed using DINOv2 ViT-S/14 cosine similarity threshold (0.95).

prov:wasGeneratedBy.name: Data Annotation
prov:wasGeneratedBy.description: Automated pipeline: CLIP ViT-B/32 scores presence of each of 10 semantic classes per frame. LAB colorspace k-means (k=5) segments image regions. Contours of matching regions converted to COCO polygon format. Annotations uploaded to Roboflow (project: disasterview-seg). CLIP verification pass assigns confidence scores; frames below 0.7 flagged for human review. No human annotators used; inter-annotator agreement N/A.
